// 01 — About Me

WHO
AM I?

I'm Jaafer, a developer deeply passionate about crafting modern digital experiences. From complex back-end systems to polished, pixel-perfect interfaces — I love the full spectrum of building for the web.

I specialize in creating collaborative platforms, academic tools, and web applications that solve real problems. My approach blends clean architecture with thoughtful design.

Currently exploring new opportunities and working on projects that push the boundaries of what the web can do.
